name: bmiresult
description: BMI Result — free body mass index tool for bmiresult.com

scripts.deploy: astro build && rm -f .wrangler/deploy/config.json && mv dist/client/wrangler.json dist/client/wrangler.json.bak && wrangler pages deploy dist/client --project-name=bmiresult --commit-dirty=true; mv dist/client/wrangler.json.bak dist/client/wrangler.json
